typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		VIIDWFGUID as string,
		TCOO as string,
		CTO as string,
		{505_Indicator} as string,
		{505_Indicator__copy_} as string,

		Approved_Deferred_Remediation_Date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Approved_Deferred_Remediation_Dt as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Asset_Class as string,

		ASSET_CI_TYPE as string,
		CI_Name as string,

		CM_Intake_Filter as boolean,

		CM_Intake_Flag as boolean,
		CM_PRE_EXCEPTION_NUMBER as string,
		CM_VAT_FALSE_POSITIVE as string,
		Compliance_Status as boolean,
		Consequence_Model_Escalation_Date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Data_ID_concat as string,
		Data_Valid_Concat as string,
		Data_Validation_ID as double,

		Date_Logic as boolean,

		Number_of_Records as double,
		OS_Maintenance_Support as string,
		OverdueVulnInstanceCount as double,
		Owned_By as string,
		PAI_Flag as boolean,
		Path as string,
		Path_Ind as string,
		Path_Vuln_Chk as double,
		Path_ProductName as string,
		Pending_Escalation as boolean,

		PRM_ as string,
		Product_Name as string,

		REMED_COMPETENCY_CENTER_COMMENTS_DESC as string,
		REMED_QVRU_ASSET_CLASS_NM as string,
		REMED_RESEARCH_COMMENTS_DESC as string,
		REMED_VO_DATA_ISSUE_NM as string,
		Remediation_CR_Number as string,

		SN_LOB as string,

		z11_2 as string,
		z12_1 as string,
		z12_1_desc as string,
		z12_2 as string,
		z12_2_desc as string,
		z13_1 as string,
		z14_1 as string,
		z2_1 as string,
		z2_2 as string,
		z3_1 as string,
		z3_2 as string,
		z3_3 as string,
		z4_1 as string,
		z5_1 as string,
		z5_2 as string,
		z5_2_desc as string,
		z6_1 as string,

		z8_1 as string,
		z8_2 as string,
		z8_3 as string,
		z9_1 as string

	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false) ~> OOBReport
OOBReport select(mapColumn(
		VIIDWFGUID = VIIDWFGUID,
		TCOO = TCOO,
		CTO = CTO,
		{505_Indicator} = {505_Indicator},
		{505_Indicator__copy_} = {505_Indicator__copy_},

		Product_Name = Product_Name,

		z8_1 = z8_1,
